desc: CLI quality hardening — JSON envelope enforcement, instrumentation context, claim cache, discoverability audit, workflow improvements

init.desc: Synthetic init — root of CLI quality DAG

json-default-flip.desc: Audit and enforce JSON-as-default across all commands. Grep all cmdXxx functions for console.log bypass patterns, document findings, add test that calls orient without flags and asserts stdout parses as JSON.

validate.command: bin/roadmap orient --note 'test' 2>/dev/null | node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf-8'))" && echo 'JSON valid' || exit 1

p9-002-latency-guard.desc: Add P50 < 300ms guard to tests/cli/integration.test.ts. Run orient N=10 times in loop using existing runCli() + CliResult.durationMs. Sort durations, assert sorted[4] < 300.

validate.command: grep -q 'P50\|latency' tests/cli/integration.test.ts && npm test -- integration.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -q 'pass\|✓' && exit 0 || exit 1

p9-003-chart-envelope.desc: Refactor cmdChart (bin/roadmap.ts:1447-1618). Build chartData + chartRenderModel unconditionally, call json(chartData, chartRenderModel) always, route human display through --human flag via cli-human.ts renderChart.

instrument-context.desc: Add nodeId?, dagId?, noteText?, stderrLines? to CommandExecution interface. Update startExecution(cmd, args, context?) to accept optional context. Add unit tests in new tests/metaflow/command-instrumentation.test.ts.

validate.command: npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- command-instrumentation.test.ts && echo 'Instrumentation context added' || exit 1

claims-cache.desc: Add module-level Map<string, BoundToken[]> cache in src/lib/utils/tokens/token-store.ts. listTokens(root, type) populates cache on first call per ${root}:${type} key. writeToken() deletes from cache after write. Eliminates 396-file scan on every loadClaims().

validate.command: npm test -- claims-cache.test.ts && echo 'Claims cache tested' || exit 1

usage-mine.desc: Run 20+ instrumented CLI commands (orient, chart, show, claim, validate, trail) using CommandInstrument. Capture enhanced CommandExecution data (with new context fields). Write mining-run.json with aggregated stats. Extract command sequences from .roadmap/trail.jsonl → trail-sequences.json.

validate.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.roadmap/cli-quality/mining-run.json','utf-8')); if(d.commands && d.commands.length >= 20) { console.log('Mining complete: ' + d.commands.length + ' commands'); process.exit(0); } else { process.exit(1); }"

discoverability-audit.desc: Analyze trail sequences and mining data for workflow gaps. Produce scored audit using formula: 100 - (unknownCommandRate*30) - (errorWithoutRetryRate*20) - (workflowAbandonRate*30) - (unusedFlagPenalty*20)

validate.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.roadmap/cli-quality/discoverability-score.json','utf-8')); if(typeof d.score==='number' && d.score>=0 && d.score<=100) { console.log('Discoverability score: ' + d.score); process.exit(0); } else { process.exit(1); }"

workflow-guide.desc: Add context-aware next-step hints to envelope render blocks. Target commands identified in audit: orient→suggest show <node>, chart→suggest show <current>, claim→suggest complete <node>. Hints go in render.hints[], not console.log. Add tests/cli/workflow-guide.test.ts asserting hints present in envelope.

validate.command: npm test -- workflow-guide.test.ts && echo 'Workflow guide added' || exit 1

help-improvements.desc: Based on discoverability-audit findings: add flag aliases for most-missed flags, add 3 example workflows to help output, improve top-3 error messages. Validate: bin/roadmap help output contains 'Example' or 'example'.

validate.command: bin/roadmap help 2>&1 | grep -i 'example' && echo 'Help improvements added' || exit 1

integration-test.desc: Full test suite pass. All tests/cli/ + tests/claims/ + tests/metaflow/ tests pass.

validate.command: npx vitest run tests/cli tests/claims tests/metaflow 2>&1 | tee /tmp/test-report.txt && grep -q 'Test Files.*passed' /tmp/test-report.txt && node -e "JSON.parse('{\"status\":\"pass\"}')" && echo 'Integration tests passed' || exit 1

dogfood-measure.desc: Real-world workflow: 5× (orient→chart→show→claim→complete). Capture P50/P95, claim cache read time, envelope compliance rate.

validate.command: node -e "const m=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.roadmap/cli-quality/dogfood-metrics.json','utf-8')); if(m.orientP50Ms<300 && m.envelopeComplianceRate===1.0) { console.log('Dogfood metrics OK'); process.exit(0); } else { process.exit(1); }"

synthesis.desc: Aggregate all phase metrics. Terminal gate: P50 < 300ms, compliance = 1.0, discoverability score delta >= 0.

validate.command: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.roadmap/cli-quality/synthesis-report.json','utf-8')); if(s.orientP50Ms<300 && s.envelopeComplianceRate===1.0) { console.log('Synthesis complete'); process.exit(0); } else { process.exit(1); }"

term.desc: CLI quality hardening complete — all targets met
